function.name: browserWait
function.description: Wait for the current page to settle or for a visible ref, text snippet, URL fragment, or title fragment to appear before continuing.

Ref.description: Optional ref that should become visible.

TextContains.description: Optional visible text fragment that should appear on the page.

UrlContains.description: Optional URL fragment that should appear in the current tab URL.

TitleContains.description: Optional title fragment that should appear in the current page title.

TimeoutMs.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 5000.
